title: ControlFlow Sources Definition
description: Schema for a sources document containing full data-source definitions.

sources.description: Full data source definitions for import into ControlFlow.

id.description: Unique source identifier matching references in control docs.

title.description: Optional author-facing display name for the source, shown in the control-plane source picker, sources list, and source editor. Display/UI metadata only — not carried into the export bundle.

description.description: Optional one-line description of the extract, shown in the workpaper's Data Sources section.

completeness_accuracy.description: Optional Completeness & Accuracy assertion for the extract, shown in the workpaper's Data Sources section.

extract_date.description: Optional as-of date of the extract (the date the data is current as of), shown as the Extract Date in the workpaper's Data Sources section.

type.description: Source type (e.g. file, s3, snowflake, rest).

config.description: Connection / location configuration for this source type.

key_config.description: Row key derivation config (mode + optional columns).
